Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Jodi Beloff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Graybar Electric Company, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Jim Dunn was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Ken W. Sola ind. and dba KWS Communications as follows:
Damages $27,540.55
Service Charges $3,643.36
Attorney's Fees $8,366.75
Costs $1,002.95 for a total of $40,553.61
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2009 Continued To Jul-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
